steps.title: Find the side length using the volume formula
steps.content:
A cube with side length $s$ has volume $V = s^3$. We need to solve $s^3 = 474,552$ for $s$.

Estimate: Since $70^3 = 343,000$ and $80^3 = 512,000$, the side length is between 70 and 80.

Test $s = 78$:
$$78^2 = 6,084$$
$$78^3 = 6,084 \times 78 = 474,552 \checkmark$$
So $s = 78$.

steps.title: Calculate the surface area
steps.content:
A cube has 6 square faces. The surface area is:
$$A = 6s^2 = 6 \times (78)^2 = 6 \times 6,084 = 36,504 \text{ square units}$$
